message:
fix(test): isolate dolt integration tests from production server (gt-oa5d)

Both wl_commons_integration_test.go and wisps_migrate_test.go used a
requireDoltServer() that only checked for the dolt binary but let all
SQL operations fall through to the production server on port 3307.

Replace with startIsolatedDoltServer() that spins up a dedicated dolt
sql-server on a dynamic port with a temp data directory. Sets
GT_DOLT_PORT via t.Setenv so DefaultConfig, IsRunning, serverExecSQL,
and buildDoltSQLCmd all route to the test server. For wisps_migrate
tests, setupBdWorkDir creates a .beads/metadata.json pointing bd CLI
at the isolated server with a minimal beads_test database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
